candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over subtotal-style 'Total Revenue'.
Revenue component, but not total company revenue.
Also total revenue, but a total/subtotal label and duplicate of 'Revenue'.

candidates.row_label: Capital gains/losses on sales/disposals of non current assets

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue label changes over time; 'Revenue' preferred, 'Total Revenue' as fallback.

candidates.why: Direct cost line directly below revenue; matches cost of sales/services.
Also matches COGS, appears duplicate of 'Cost of services provided'.

variables.notes: Selected the more specific direct-cost label; 'Cost of revenues/COGS' appears to be a duplicate mapping of the same values.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component within operating expenses.
Share-based comp can be SG&A-related, but cash flow sheet is not preferred for PROF row mapping and this is supplemental.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list clearly misses major SG&A overhead components visible in the Income Statement. No explicit SG&A total row is present, so selected the best overhead buckets from the full A-column preview: Marketing expenses, Personnel expenses, and Other external expenses. Excluded depreciation/amortization, COGS, financing, and totals. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Marketing expenses, [Income Statement] Other external expenses

candidates.why: Development-related, but this is capitalised cost (a contra/adjustment), not clearly reported R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense line is reported. 'Capitalised development costs' is not the same as R&D expense, so XRD is treated as missing.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list of interest-expense labels. Main line preferred; generic interest label and lease-interest line included as fallbacks for label variation over time.

candidates.why: Not book equity; unrelated cash flow adjustment.

Cash flow item, not minority interest balance.
